mapper.select: SELECT wr.* FROM weight_record wr INNER JOIN ( SELECT slot_id, MAX(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM weight_record WHERE cabinet_id = #{cabinetId} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY slot_id ) latest ON wr.slot_id = latest.slot_id AND wr.recorded_at = latest.recorded_at WHERE wr.cabinet_id = #{cabinetId} AND wr.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM weight_record WHERE cabinet_id = #{cabinetId} AND slot_id = #{slotId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1
